rule: Pass MODEL=sonnet for routine/periodic work (Scanner/Evaluator/Renderer/batch jobs/rule-based scans). Pass MODEL=opus (or omit, default) for decision-making (architecture, design, code review, multi-step reasoning). The skill maps the slug + adds Bedrock prefix automatically. --dangerously-skip-permissions is always on. Mukul's policy: 'Choose Sonnet 1M for routine periodic work. For decision making, use Opus 1M.'
why: On 2026-05-22 Mukul named the model policy explicitly while approving the v3 architecture build. Rule pinned so future spawns don't burn Opus tokens on cron pulses.
